summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HabitRPG gamified life improvement app (Iteration 3). All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all major features including onboarding flow fix, Game Mode, Focus Mode, habit management, level system, progress tracking, and mobile responsiveness.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps mobile bottom nav - requires force click to bypass. This is a known platform limitation and cannot be removed.

passed_tests: User registration with starting gems (50) and streak revive (1)
Onboarding flow - all 5 questions save correctly
Complete habit - earns XP and gems (Game Mode)
Level definitions (10 levels from Rookie to Apex)
Level rewards (gems and streak revives per level)
Existing user login goes directly to dashboard
Home page: greeting, level badge, streak, XP bar
Home page: Game Mode shows gems and streak revives
Add Habit dialog opens and creates habits
Level page: current level, XP progress, 'X XP until Level Y'
Level page: Game Mode shows gem/revive rewards per level
Progress page: Daily and Weekly tabs with charts
Settings page: profile, mode switch, notifications, logout
Focus Mode: minimal UI without game elements
Shop dialog opens from gems counter click
seed_data_creation: Admin and test users are seeded on backend startup via seed_admin() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major bugs have been fixed. The onboarding redirect loop is resolved - new users complete onboarding and are redirected to dashboard correctly. XP/Level consistency is correct (admin at 510 XP = Level 4 Achiever). Game Mode features (gems, streak revives, shop, roasts) are working. Focus Mode shows minimal UI without game elements. Mobile nav works but requires force click due to Emergent badge overlay (platform limitation).
verified_fixes: Onboarding redirect loop - FIXED: updateUser called with backend response after final step
Admin XP/Level consistency (500->525 for Level 4) - FIXED: Admin at 510 XP = Level 4
LevelPage shows game rewards (gems/revives) per level - VERIFIED
XP off-by-one 'N XP until Level X' - FIXED: Shows '390 XP until Level 5'
Mobile bottom nav z-index - VERIFIED: Nav is above content but Emergent badge overlaps
